stemHtml: Select the statement which best describes how a cockpit windshield hydrophobic seal coating works.

options.a: If the coating is correctly installed, the use of windshield wipers is not required.
options.b: The coating causes rain droplets to bead up and roll off the windshield enhancing the vision of the flight crew. It is applied externally by the manufacturer and deeply penetrates the windshield surface.
options.c: The coating causes rain droplets to bead up and roll off the windshield enhancing the vision of the flight crew. It is applied externally by engineers and can easily be replaced during an aircraft transit stop.
options.d: The coating relies on the cockpit windshield heating element to activate its water repelling properties.
